name: Bacon and Chive White Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the bacon and set aside.
2. Melt butter in a 1-quart glass measuring pitcher in the microwave oven (about 30 seconds at High). Add flour; mix until smooth. Add milk gradually, stirring constantly.
3. Cook uncovered in the microwave oven for 4 minutes at High, or until thickened. Stir after 2 minutes, then every 30 seconds.
4. Add crumbled bacon, chopped chives, and salt; stir. Serve over fresh vegetables.
Yield: About 1 cup.
